title: Latvian parliament replaces outdated voting system
summary_full: Starting today, July 23rd, voting at Saeima sessions is using a new electronic voting system, which replaces the outdated – but impressively still functional – voting machines that have been in use since 1997.
summary_public: Starting today, July 23rd, voting at Saeima sessions is using a new electronic voting system, which replaces the outdated – but impressively still functional – voting machines that have been in use since 1997.

LV.label: positive
LV.evidence: Latvian parliament replaces outdated voting system
